articles.title: EXEC: Nike and Apple CEOs Loaded Up on NKE Shares as Price Fell
articles.summary: Nike's president and CEO, Elliott Hill, and Apple's CEO and Nike's lead independent director, Tim Cook, recently purchased significant amounts of Nike shares after a stock price decline. Cook bought 25,000 shares for approximately $1.06 million, while Hill acquired 23,660 shares for about $1 million. These purchases are seen by some investors as a vote of confidence amid Nike's disappointing guidance and a significant stock drop.
articles.text_to_analyze: EXEC: Nike and Apple CEOs Loaded Up on NKE Shares as Price Fell. Cook bought 25,000 shares for approximately $1.06 million, while Hill acquired 23,660 shares for about $1 million. These purchases are seen by some investors as a vote of confidence amid Nike's disappointing guidance and a significant stock drop.
